videos.title: I Play 36 Shadowborn Apostles (for deck thinning ONLY) | Against the Odds
videos.description:
What's the jankiest possible way to get a turn three Emrakul? What are the odds of pulling it off? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/against-the-odds-shelldock-surprise-historic
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7356201#paper
